{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with leadership rotating through IT (COFORGE +11%), pharma (LUPIN/AURO +4-7%), defense (GRSE +9%), capital goods (TITAGARH +9%), FMCG (MARICO ATH), and financials (ABCAPITAL ATH, CAMS +10%). Most held positions are showing strong gap-up moves today, putting the book in significant unrealized profit territory and triggering trail-SL discipline across the board. Global cues constructive (US +1.5-2%).",

      "nifty_support": 24800,
      "nifty_resistance": 25400
    }

      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Held at 984, CMP 1056.70 (+7.4% unrealized). Stored SL 1035 already above entry — locking in a winner. Trail SL FROM 1035 to 1040 would be a sub-0.5% micro-adjust violating trail-gap discipline; CMP-SL gap currently ~2.1% which is healthy. NO-OP MODIFY would be wasted signal — converting to HOLD. Correction: emitting HOLD instead."

Position size ~11% of portfolio. NO-OP — converting to HOLD with note to monitor for event-trim by May 12."

    {
      "action": "MODIFY",

      "product": "MIS",

Cannot MODIFY a pending order per schema rules. Flagging in portfolio_notes for cancellation; the engine should auto-expire MIS orders end-of-day. If still working today, treat as zombie."

  "position_actions": [

  "watchlist_notes": "LUPIN reporting Q4 today — binary, skip. DABUR reporting today — binary AND bearish setup, skip. AUROPHARMA gap-up extended +7.6%, MACD bearish on daily, chase risk. HINDPETRO has under-recovery overhang despite crude relief — bearish research take, skip. POLYCAB, BHARATFORG, BAJAJ-AUTO, M&M, VEDL, SRF, GABRIEL, NEULANDLAB, CHOLAHLDNG, HDFCBANK — interesting setups but book is already 100% deployed (11 CNC positions) and cluster discipline limits new admissions. NIFTYBEES not needed — book is fully deployed.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is fully deployed across 11 CNC positions worth ~Rs 462k against capital of Rs 462k — 100% deployed, breaching the 80% soft target meaningfully. Note: stale HFCL pending MIS BUY from 30+ hours ago (1824 min) is a zombie order that should have expired; flagging for review. Cumulative experiment P&L is -53.72% which is severe — most of that loss appears to predate the current book given today's strong gap-ups across most holdings. CAUTION: HAL Q4 board meeting May 14 (5 sessions out) — by Day 13/14 of week (May 12) must either EXIT or tighten SL to within 2-3% of LTP per binary-event discipline. Will revisit at next tick. NO new entries today: book is full, multiple held names are at gap-up/ATH levels with positive unrealized P&L — discipline says manage what's working, don't add correlated risk into a strong-tape session that has already moved."
}
